steps.title: Spot the defining signal
steps.content: The phrase “Few economists would have predicted” reveals the core difficulty: the collectibles market is hard because future price movements are unpredictable and often surprising, as shown by the unexpected Beanie Babies price surge.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Forecast means to predict future trends. The passage identifies the collectibles market's core difficulty: predicting future prices is unreliable, as shown by few economists foreseeing the Beanie Babies boom, so forecast captures this perfectly.

The other choices address unrelated concepts: exchange (trade), monitor (observe), and avoid (stay away).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
